rationale: Both reviews catch the same four core API defects, but Review 2 additionally identifies two grounded, verifiable issues: the variable-shadowing rebind in AlgPoints (outer Field/HopfAlgebra context silently dropped) and the redundant extends-generated instance for SemisimpleGroup. Acting on Review 2 removes these additional real defects, yielding a cleaner PR; the extra contradictory findings (simp on a predicate being removed, GL_n instances) are easy for the author to discard.
